title: paspalidium geminatum var. paludivagum
intro: Paspalidium geminatum var. paludivagum, also known as palo verde grass, is a variety of perennial grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Paspalidium geminatum var. paludivagum can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or poultice to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, including salves and creams.
